title: Trading Settings
confirmDesc: Popup with configurable timeout and action
leaveBlankDefault: Leave blank to use global defaults.
demoModeDesc: Viewing sample data. Switch to Live to connect to the gateway.
liveModeDesc: Connected to the gateway for real-time data.
switchToLiveDesc: Live mode shows real positions, trades, and portfolio data from your connected trading platforms. The demo sample data will be hidden.
startInstructions: If you haven't started Tigerpaw yet, open a terminal and run:
serverNotRunningNote: If the server isn't running, the dashboard will show empty data — nothing will break. You can always switch back to Demo.
tigerGoldDesc: Warm amber orbs with tiger-stripe texture
midnightSteelDesc: Cool neutral glass on dark grey
remoteAccessDesc: How you access the Tigerpaw dashboard. API keys and trade execution always stay on this machine.
orderExecLocal: Order execution (trades placed from this machine)
tailscaleStep1: Install Tailscale on this server and every device you want to access the dashboard from
tailscaleStep2: Sign in to the same Tailscale network on both
tailscaleStep3: Click "Save & Restart" below — the dashboard will bind to your Tailscale IP
tailscaleStep4: Open http://<tailscale-ip>:18789 from any connected device
tailscaleNote: Tailscale uses WireGuard — traffic is encrypted end-to-end. Not even Tailscale's relay servers can decrypt your data.
cloudflareSetupStep1: Install cloudflared on this server (no install needed on your phone/laptop)
cloudflareSetupStep3: Copy the tunnel URL below and click "Save & Restart"
cloudflareWarning: Cloudflare decrypts traffic at their edge — they can technically see dashboard data in transit. Your API keys are never sent to the dashboard, so they remain safe.
gatewayNotReachable: Gateway not reachable — start Tigerpaw first
cloudflareAccessDesc: Access from anywhere via HTTPS. Only requires cloudflared on the server.
tailscaleAccessDesc: Access from your devices via WireGuard mesh VPN. Requires Tailscale on both server and client devices.
globalLimitsInfo: Applies to all platforms. Use Per-Extension Overrides below to customize.
perExtensionDesc: Customize risk limits for individual platforms. These override the global limits above.
predictionNote: Binary contracts — positions resolve to $0 or full payout. Drawdown and concentration limits behave differently than continuous assets.
playMoneyNote: Play money (Mana). USD limits apply as Mana values. Daily spend and portfolio totals exclude this platform.
perpetualsNote: Order placement not yet functional — policy validates but orders cannot execute.
toastPopupsDesc: Show temporary notifications in the bottom-right corner
browserNotificationsDesc: Desktop alerts for errors and warnings (even when tab is in background)
globalEventsNote: Global events (kill switch, limit warnings) are always shown regardless of platform filter.
notificationLimitNote: Up to 50 notifications are kept in memory. The bell badge shows up to 9+. Notifications persist until dismissed or cleared.
